name: How much money can I get for silicosis from cutting stone countertops at work?
description: $100K-$500K+ typical for silicosis workers' comp, based on disability and wages.[2]

mainEntity.name: How much money can I get for silicosis from cutting stone countertops at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: $100K-$500K+ typical for silicosis workers' comp, based on disability and wages.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Compensation varies but averages **$100K-$500K+** in workers' comp for silicosis, covering medical bills, lost wages (2/3 of salary), and permanent disability ratings.[2][6]

Value depends on severity, age, income, and life impact; severe cases with surgery or oxygen needs yield higher settlements.[1]

**Key factors:**
- Impairment percentage from lung function tests
- Future care costs
- Lost earning capacity
- Pain and suffering (limited in workers' comp)

**Practical guidance:** Use a lawyer for settlement evaluation; get independent medical exam. Compare to similar Utah cases.
Free consultations assess your case worth.
